headline: State Street to Speak at the Morgan Stanley U.S. Financials Conference
summary: BOSTON, May 29, 2026--State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) announced today that its Chief Financial Officer, John Woods, will present at the Morgan Stanley U.S. Financials Conference in New York, NY on Wednesday, June 10, 2026 at approximately 1:45 pm ET.

headline: 2 Major Regional Bank Stocks to Buy on Favorable Industry Trends
summary: State Street and Northern Trust are well-placed for growth as the Zacks Major Regional Banks industry benefits from business restructuring, acquisitions, digitization, decent loan demand and lower rates.

headline: Q1 Earnings Highs And Lows: State Street (NYSE:STT) Vs The Rest Of The Custody Bank Stocks
summary: As the Q1 earnings season wraps, let’s dig into this quarter’s best and worst performers in the custody bank industry, including State Street (NYSE:STT) and its peers.
